name: efinix-riscv-kit
description: Provides development tools for the RISC-V cores on Efinix FPGAs

efinixRiscvKit.efinityPath.description: Path to the installation directory of the Efinity IDE (the directory containing 'debugger/'). Used as EFINITY_INSTALL_DIR in the generated CMakeUserPresets.json. Must be configured

efinixRiscvKit.efinityToolchainPath.description: Path to the RISC-V toolchain root (the directory containing 'bin/riscv-none-elf-gcc'). Used as TOOLCHAIN_DIR in the generated CMakeUserPresets.json. Must be configured

efinixRiscvKit.openocdPath.description: Path to the openocd executable. May be an absolute path or a name resolved on PATH. Used as OPENOCD in the generated CMakeUserPresets.json

scripts.compile: yarn run check-types && yarn run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: yarn run check-types && yarn run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: yarn run compile-tests && yarn run compile && yarn run lint
